user.title: Enigma2 Remote Control
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Enigma2 device. Leave username and password empty if OpenWebif runs without authentication.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Enigma2 device. Check the host, port, and that OpenWebif is running. See the Home Assistant log for details.
error.cannot_resolve: Cannot resolve the hostname. Check the hostname and network connectivity from Home Assistant.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed (HTTP 401). Check the username and password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the Home Assistant log for details.
